final_prompt.prompt:
Create an architectural concept illustration of a futuristic floating cityscape.

Style/medium: needs a futuristic architectural aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition:

Scene/backdrop: must include an aerial/cityscape context for the floating structure
Lighting/mood: needs a sustainable-future atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, white-forward direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
